steps.purpose: live league-wide standings (returned flat by conference for NBA, by league for MLB, by division for NFL; ALWAYS apply per-league division map client-side for NBA + MLB)
client-side bucket teams by division. ESPN does NOT pre-group by division for NBA/MLB; the per-league division map lives in notes.
sort by winPercent (asc for bottom/worst, desc for top/best); take N per division
